arts.ttl: Man United, Liverpool make contact to sign 24-year-old wide player on Arsenal and Chelsea radar
arts.sum: Bayern Munich defender Alphonso Davies has been linked with a move away from the German club as he nears the end of his current contract. The 24-year-old left-back will be a free agent at the end of the season and the likes of Manchester United and Liverpool are keen on him. arts.ttl: Alexis Mac Allister faces extended spell out after Liverpool ban changes
arts.sum: Alexis Mac Allister will now be banned for the Premier League game against Fulham following postponement of Merseyside derby at Everton

arts.ttl: Analysts feel Liverpool star needed Arne Slot influence – Now the best in the world
arts.sum: Liverpool star Virgil van Dijk may have needed Arne Slot’s arrival at the club to help get back to his best. That’s according to analysts Anso Jansen and Kees Luijckx via Voetbal Primeur, who believes Slot’s influence has turned the Liverpool captain into the best in the world once again. arts.ttl: Everton v Liverpool Merseyside derby postponed due to Storm Darragh
arts.sum: Rain and winds of up to 70mph presented safety risk Game was called off at 8.30am on Saturday morning The Merseyside derby, scheduled to kick off at Goodison Park at 12.30pm on Saturday, has been postponed due to the impact of Storm Darragh. Winds of up to 70mph and severe weather conditions have resulted in travel disruption in and around Merseyside and presented a risk a safety. A decision to postpone the game between Everton and Liverpool was taken at 8.30am on Saturday. Continue reading...

arts.sum: Storm Darragh has unleashed chaos across the UK as high winds and rain batter the country - and the storm has already claimed one Premier League game with further events set to be postponed
